description: This is a simple, low-poly model of a four-poster bed. The bed frame is made of brown wood with a headboard and footboard featuring simple, turned posts. The mattress is covered with white sheets, and a light blue duvet is neatly folded over it. A single white pillow rests at the head of the bed. The overall design is minimalist and appears to be a 3D render. It's depicted against a plain gray background.
